
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
```


```{r}
sumstats <- fread("/gpfs/space/GI/GV/Projects/SAMPO/temp_aa/MVP_t1d_sumstats_cropped.txt.gz")
colnames(sumstats)
```


```{r}
window_size <- 500e3
lead_p <- 5e-8   # change if needed

# Sort once
ord <- order(sumstats$chromosome, sumstats$base_pair_location)
sumstats <- sumstats[ord, ]

# Initialize
sumstats$locus_id <- NA_integer_
sumstats$is_lead <- FALSE

# Candidate lead SNPs: only significant ones
sig_idx <- which(!is.na(sumstats$p_value) & sumstats$p_value <= lead_p)

# Process candidates in order of strongest association first
sig_idx <- sig_idx[order(sumstats$p_value[sig_idx])]

current_locus <- 0L
lead_rows <- integer(0)

for (idx in sig_idx) {
  # Skip if this SNP is already covered by an existing locus
  if (!is.na(sumstats$locus_id[idx])) next

  current_locus <- current_locus + 1L
  sumstats$is_lead[idx] <- TRUE
  lead_rows <- c(lead_rows, idx)

  chr_i <- sumstats$chromosome[idx]
  pos_i <- sumstats$base_pair_location[idx]

  in_window <- which(
    is.na(sumstats$locus_id) &
    sumstats$chromosome == chr_i &
    sumstats$base_pair_location >= (pos_i - window_size) &
    sumstats$base_pair_location <= (pos_i + window_size)
  )

  sumstats$locus_id[in_window] <- current_locus
}
```

```{r}

locus_summary <- sumstats %>%
  filter(!is.na(locus_id)) %>%
  group_by(locus_id) %>%
  summarise(
    chromosome = first(chromosome),
    start_bp   = min(base_pair_location),
    end_bp     = max(base_pair_location),
    lead_snp   = rsid[which.min(p_value)],
    lead_p     = min(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_snps     = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(lead_p)

head(locus_summary)
```

```{r}
#################################################
## LD-free ABF fine-mapping ##
#################################################

## ---------------------------
## 1. Parameters
## ---------------------------

W <- 0.2^2
P_MIN <- 1e-300
window_size <- 500e3

## ---------------------------
## 2. Checks + preprocessing
## ---------------------------

setDT(sumstats)

required_cols <- c(
  "rsid", "chromosome", "base_pair_location",
  "odds_ratio", "p_value"
)
stopifnot(all(required_cols %in% names(sumstats)))

# Keep only usable rows
sumstats <- sumstats[
  !is.na(odds_ratio) &
  !is.na(p_value) &
  !is.na(chromosome) &
  !is.na(base_pair_location)
]

# Remove MHC region
sumstats <- sumstats[
  !(chromosome == 6 &
    base_pair_location >= 25e6 &
    base_pair_location <= 35e6)
]

## ---------------------------
## 3. Derive beta, Z, SE
## ---------------------------

# Clamp p-values safely
sumstats[, p_safe := fifelse(p_value < P_MIN, P_MIN,
                      fifelse(p_value > 1, 1, p_value))]

sumstats[, beta := log(odds_ratio)]
sumstats[, Z := qnorm(1 - p_safe / 2) * sign(beta)]

# Uninformative SNPs
sumstats[, zero_z := abs(Z) < 1e-8]

# Standard errors
sumstats[, se := fifelse(!zero_z, abs(beta / Z), Inf)]

## ---------------------------
## 4. Wakefield ABF
## ---------------------------

sumstats[, V := se^2]
sumstats[, ABF := NA_real_]

idx <- !sumstats$zero_z & is.finite(sumstats$V)

sumstats[idx, ABF :=
  sqrt(V / (V + W)) *
  exp((Z^2 * W) / (2 * (V + W)))
]

# Neutral evidence for uninformative SNPs
sumstats[zero_z == TRUE, ABF := 1]

if (all(is.na(sumstats$ABF))) {
  stop("All ABFs are NA â€” check input data.")
}

## ---------------------------
## 5. Posterior inclusion probabilities
## ---------------------------

abf_sum <- sum(sumstats$ABF, na.rm = TRUE)
sumstats[, PIP := ABF / abf_sum]

## ---------------------------
## 6. Credible set
## ---------------------------

setorder(sumstats, -PIP)
sumstats[, cumPIP := cumsum(PIP)]

# Include the first SNP that pushes cumulative PIP above 0.95
cs_idx <- which(sumstats$cumPIP >= 0.95)[1]

if (is.na(cs_idx) || length(cs_idx) == 0L) {
  cs_idx <- nrow(sumstats)
}

credible_95 <- sumstats[1:cs_idx]

cat("\n95% credible set size:", nrow(credible_95), "\n")
```

```{r}
top5_pip <- sumstats[order(-PIP)][1:min(5, .N),
  .(rsid, chromosome, base_pair_location, p_value, PIP)
]

print(top5_pip)
```

```{r}
hist(
  sumstats$PIP[sumstats$PIP > 0.001],
  breaks = 50,
  main = "PIP > 0.001",
  xlab = "PIP"
)
```


```{r}
plot(
  -log10(sumstats$p_value),
  sumstats$PIP,
  pch = 20,
  col = rgb(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
  xlab = "-log10(p)",
  ylab = "PIP"
)
```
